questions.question: At what threshold of AI autonomy and capability will global governance frameworks need to enforce binding international regulations to prevent systemic risks?
questions.why_it_matters: Determining this threshold can guide preemptive policy to avoid catastrophic misuse or unintended consequences of AI.

questions.question: How soon will quantum computing breakthroughs render current cryptographic systems insecure, necessitating a global transition to post-quantum cryptography?
questions.why_it_matters: Timing this transition is critical to securing financial, governmental, and personal data before vulnerabilities are exploited.
signals_to_watch: demonstrations of quantum supremacy on cryptography tasks

questions.question: Will multipolar international relations lead to a sustained period of geopolitical stability or increase the likelihood of major conflict in the next two decades?
questions.why_it_matters: Understanding this trajectory informs defense, diplomacy, and economic strategy globally.

questions.question: Can decentralized digital governance models achieve widespread legitimacy and effectiveness compared to traditional nation-states within 15 years?
questions.why_it_matters: Answers could disrupt or reinforce the current paradigms of political authority and citizen participation.
signals_to_watch: public trust metrics in decentralized vs centralized institutions

questions.question: Will AI-driven automation replace more than 30% of current human labor roles globally by 2035, and what sectors are most vulnerable or resilient?
questions.why_it_matters: This impacts economic planning, social safety nets, and education system redesign.
signals_to_watch: AI capability improvements in complex tasks

questions.question: Is it possible to develop broadly effective, affordable anti-aging interventions that extend healthy human lifespan by more than 25% within 20 years?
questions.why_it_matters: Success would revolutionize healthcare, economics, and social structures.
signals_to_watch: clinical trial results of longevity therapies

questions.question: Will globally coordinated carbon removal technologies scale to offset at least 30% of annual emissions by 2040, complementing emission reductions?
questions.why_it_matters: Understanding scalability affects climate policy and investments in mitigation strategies.
signals_to_watch: deployment metrics of carbon removal projects
cost trends in carbon capture technologies

questions.question: To what extent will AI-generated content displace human cultural production in mainstream media consumption within 10 years?
questions.why_it_matters: Shifts in cultural production affect creativity, employment, and information ecosystems.
